title: calea kunhardtii
intro: Calea kunhardtii, also known as Kunhardt's Dogweed or Mexican Damiana, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family. Traditionally used in folk medicine, its leaves and roots have been employed for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Calea kunhardtii include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Calea kunhardtii is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing for the extraction of its active compounds and utilization of its therapeutic properties.
